name: crawl-sim
description: Agent-native multi-bot web crawler simulator. Audit how Googlebot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and PerplexityBot see a site.

interface.shortDescription: Audit a site as search and AI crawlers.
interface.longDescription: Runs a multi-bot visibility audit that compares how Googlebot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and PerplexityBot can access and understand a page.
defaultPrompt: Audit https://example.com for AI crawler visibility
Compare my site with a competitor using crawl-sim
Check robots.txt, schema, and parity for this URL
